description: PRD-29: Design consistency pass 3 — transition-colors on remaining interactive elements

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to NavBar buttons (logout, theme toggle)
userStories.description: NavBar.jsx has multiple buttons with hover states but missing transition-colors: (1) Logout button (line 75) — has hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900, (2) Mobile menu button (line 90) — uses ICON_BUTTON with hover states but missing transition-colors, (3) Theme toggle button (line 111) — has hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-900. Add transition-colors to all three buttons.
acceptanceCriteria: NavBar mobile menu button has transition-colors
NavBar theme toggle button has transition-colors

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to form interactive elements (inputs, buttons, dropdowns)
userStories.description: Multiple form components have interactive elements missing transition-colors: (1) TagInput.jsx hover states (line ~50-70), (2) ContactForm.jsx form fields and buttons (lines ~40-120), (3) JobFilters.jsx filter toggles and dropdowns (line ~30-80). Audit these components and add transition-colors to all hover/focus interactive states.
acceptanceCriteria: ContactForm fields and buttons have transition-colors

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to card and list row hover states
userStories.description: Multiple list/card components have row hover states missing transition-colors: (1) JobCard.jsx (line ~30-50), (2) KanbanCard.jsx (line ~40-60), (3) PrepChecklist.jsx (line ~50-90), (4) SavedSearchesSidebar.jsx search item rows. These components have hover:bg-gray-50 or similar without transition-colors. Add transition-colors to all row hover states.
acceptanceCriteria: JobCard rows have transition-colors on hover

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to detail panel and modal interactive elements
userStories.description: Detail panel and modal components have buttons and interactive elements missing transition-colors: (1) DetailPanelBody.jsx buttons (line ~100-150), (2) CsvImportModal.jsx buttons (line ~60-100), (3) FeedbackWidget.jsx form elements (line ~70-120). Audit and add transition-colors to all interactive hover states.

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to utility and helper component buttons
userStories.description: Utility components have buttons missing transition-colors: (1) UndoToast.jsx undo button (line ~40), (2) GoogleAuthButton.jsx (line ~20), (3) FollowUpBanner.jsx action button (line ~30), (4) DuplicateWarning.jsx merge/dismiss buttons (line ~35-50). Add transition-colors to all button hover states.

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to command and search interface elements
userStories.description: Command palette and search components: (1) CommandPalette.jsx command item selection states (line ~180-200), (2) SearchInput-like components in various places. These need smooth transitions between selected and unselected states. Add transition-colors where missing.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandPalette command items have smooth color transitions
Search input focus/unfocus states have transition-colors

userStories.title: Add transition-colors to all remaining interactive elements (comprehensive audit)
userStories.description: After addressing US-316 through US-321, perform a final comprehensive grep across all components to ensure no interactive elements with hover/focus states are missing transition-colors. Use: grep -r 'hover:' src/components/*.jsx | grep -v 'transition-colors' | grep -v '.test.jsx' and fix any remaining matches.
acceptanceCriteria: grep -r 'hover:' shows 0 matches without transition-colors (excluding test files)
